general: You wanna piece of me, punk?!??
Every moment I spend dealing with you I spend away from a slice of cake.
Don't listen to Norm; he's an idiot!
My hand flapping looks better than THAT form, nerd!
Why are humans obsessed with their chromosomes? If you were wondering, I don't have any.
Not my species, not my prahblem, punk!

adrian: I'M THE ONLY CRAZY B**** ALLOWED UP IN HERE, PUNK!
winston: You're worth a few minutes of eye contact <3
OKAY I LOVE YOU, PUNK! BUT I AM STLLL GONNA WIN!!!
sandoval: I don't care about your 'holiday rush' - my cake orders come FIRST, ya hear?
anton: IF YOU RUN OUTTA COOKIE DOUGH AGAIN...
norm: If I could taunt myself I would!
